title: the_garden.jar
description: Another horror mod based on old minecraft
body:
# MOD IS CURRENTLY IN BETA RELEASE

## Bugs and issues may occur

### I also want to note that I'm a solo developer.

If you want to make a video about the mod, please mention that the mod is currently in beta and include the warning section below in your video as well.

<sub>If you encounter any bugs, contact me: **nat.default** on Discord, on X at https://x.com/natdefault, or join the Discord server.</sub>

## Official Discord Server

https://discord.gg/3eE6M3vkfx

Suggestions and ideas for the mod are always welcome.

> **Due to personal issues, I will not be releasing any more major updates after 1.2.2, only bug fixes.**

### Please read the whole description, thanks.

*Hush now, and walk where petals lie,*
*Beneath a still and watchful sky.*
*Thou wert not lost when thou didst roam*
*The Garden found thee, brought thee home.*

# The Garden

**The Garden** is a psychological horror experience that introduces liminal spaces and unsettling encounters into Minecraft.

This is the only official CurseForge page of the mod.
The official Modrinth page is:
https://modrinth.com/mod/the_garden.jar

# Features

## Custom Entities

<details>
<summary>Show entities</summary>

* Stalker
* InvisibleStalker
* help_me
* saint
* N
* I
* Crawler

</details>

## New Content

* New ores and materials

  * Silver
  * Bronze
  * Tin

* Unique items

  * Silver Cross
  * Bronze Cross
  * Tin Tools

## Dimensions

<details>
<summary>Show dimensions</summary>

* the_garden
* stonery
* cemetery
* basement
* where
* pardon

</details>

## Commands

* `/thegarden` — Opens the menu UI for command information

# WARNING

This mod contains emotional and horror-related content.

### Includes:

* Sudden loud sounds and ambient noise
* Flashing lights and visual effects
* Unsettling themes and text
* Unexpected events

Audio levels for most sounds can be adjusted using Minecraft's default volume settings:

* Hostile Creatures
* Ambient/Environment
* Music

If you are sensitive to flashing lights, loud noises, or intense horror experiences, please play with caution.

Although this is one of my first full releases, the mod was built with care and a focus on creating a memorable and unsettling experience.

Feedback and suggestions are always welcome and help improve future updates.

# Inspiration

Mainly inspired by:

* wonderland.jar *(heavily inspired)*
* Minecraft ARGs
* Dreams I had
* Wanting to scare my friends with a fun mod

# Special Thanks

* JetBrains for IntelliJ IDEA

* JDG for *The Original Work*
  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/the-original-work

* Crackers0106 for some textures
  https://modrinth.com/user/Crackers0106
